TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Skikun四季部落2
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: panmwo:merge Ccquliq na Tayal qabax nya maki qalang Skikun qani, lalu qa Skikun qani ga cinlalu qa kinlhangan Nipun, baha hmcwan kintala kita qsliq na cquliq Nipun kmayal knkyan qani ga baqun calay ktayux cinbuyux na kayal qa qutux ryax qani, nanu mica Dkikun san naha qalang qani, qalang Skikun ga syugal knkyan naha qalang, maki qalang c'ux, maki qalng iyik, nya maki cka qalng qani ga baqan calay trahax, san naha Tayax cinlalu nya. blaq calay kayal nya ini kilux ro kheyak uyi, cinhtux qa ali na ruma qani ga mtasiq blaq niqun ro lbing calay baqun ccquliq qalang myan ana maki inu. Maki ppbiru bnran qani kmayal maha bawiq ki kolaw mlikuy Tayal kya, knerin hiya ga betunux ro blaq lungan naha, cwa maha kya ga knahu; bniqan na blaq kayal qalng qani. ana ccquliq ktayux naha cquliq qalng Skikun uyi ga mica kya san naha. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal giway rgrgyax qu qalang. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. basu' "basu'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. ungat kisya' nya'. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 四季部落(Qalang skikun)
S.PHON: panmwo:merɣe ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq na tajal qaβax nja maki qalaŋ s~ɕkikun qani, lalu qa s~ɕkikun qani ɣa ʦ~ʨinlalu qa kinlħaŋan nipun, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwan kintala kita qs~ɕliq na ʦ~ʨquliq nipun kmajal knkjan qani ɣa βaqun ʦ~ʨalaj ktajux ʦ~ʨinβujux na kajal qa qutux rjax qani, nanu miʦ~ʨa *kikun s~ɕan naħa qalaŋ qani, qalaŋ s~ɕkikun ɣa s~ɕjuɣal knkjan naħa qalaŋ, maki qalaŋ ʦ~ʨʔux, maki qalŋ ijik, nja maki ʦ~ʨka qalŋ qani ɣa βaqan ʦ~ʨalaj traħax, s~ɕan naħa tajax ʦ~ʨinlalu nja. βlaq ʦ~ʨalaj kajal nja ini kilux ro kħejak uji, ʦ~ʨinħtux qa ali na ruma qani ɣa mtas~ɕiq βlaq niqun ro lβiŋ ʦ~ʨalaj βaqun ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq qalaŋ mjan ana maki inu. maki ppβiru βnran qani kmajal maħa βawiq ki kolaw mlikuj tajal kja, knerin ħija ɣa βetunux ro βlaq luŋan naħa, ʦ~ʨwa maħa kja ɣa knaħu; βniqan na βlaq kajal qalŋ qani. ana ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq ktajux naħa ʦ~ʨquliq qalŋ s~ɕkikun uji ɣa miʦ~ʨa kja s~ɕan naħa. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax qu qalaŋ. s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te ħuɣal ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mwaħ rɣjax. βas~ɕuʔ "βas~ɕuʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ****(qalaŋ s~ɕkikun)
S.FORM: panmwo:merge Ccquliq na Tayal qabax nya maki qalang Skikun qani, lalu qa Skikun qani ga cinlalu qa kinlhangan Nipun, baha hmcwan kintala kita qsliq na cquliq Nipun kmayal knkyan qani ga baqun calay ktayux cinbuyux na kayal qa qutux ryax qani, nanu mica Dkikun san naha qalang qani, qalang Skikun ga syugal knkyan naha qalang, maki qalang c'ux, maki qalng iyik, nya maki cka qalng qani ga baqan calay trahax, san naha Tayax cinlalu nya. blaq calay kayal nya ini kilux ro kheyak uyi, cinhtux qa ali na ruma qani ga mtasiq blaq niqun ro lbing calay baqun ccquliq qalang myan ana maki inu. Maki ppbiru bnran qani kmayal maha bawiq ki kolaw mlikuy Tayal kya, knerin hiya ga betunux ro blaq lungan naha, cwa maha kya ga knahu; bniqan na blaq kayal qalng qani. ana ccquliq ktayux naha cquliq qalng Skikun uyi ga mica kya san naha. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal giway rgrgyax qu qalang. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. basu' "basu'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. ungat kisya' nya'. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 四季部落(Qalang skikun)
S.PHON: panmwo:merɣe ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq na tajal qaβax nja maki qalaŋ s~ɕkikun qani, lalu qa s~ɕkikun qani ɣa ʦ~ʨinlalu qa kinlħaŋan nipun, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwan kintala kita qs~ɕliq na ʦ~ʨquliq nipun kmajal knkjan qani ɣa βaqun ʦ~ʨalaj ktajux ʦ~ʨinβujux na kajal qa qutux rjax qani, nanu miʦ~ʨa *kikun s~ɕan naħa qalaŋ qani, qalaŋ s~ɕkikun ɣa s~ɕjuɣal knkjan naħa qalaŋ, maki qalaŋ ʦ~ʨʔux, maki qalŋ ijik, nja maki ʦ~ʨka qalŋ qani ɣa βaqan ʦ~ʨalaj traħax, s~ɕan naħa tajax ʦ~ʨinlalu nja. βlaq ʦ~ʨalaj kajal nja ini kilux ro kħejak uji, ʦ~ʨinħtux qa ali na ruma qani ɣa mtas~ɕiq βlaq niqun ro lβiŋ ʦ~ʨalaj βaqun ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq qalaŋ mjan ana maki inu. maki ppβiru βnran qani kmajal maħa βawiq ki kolaw mlikuj tajal kja, knerin ħija ɣa βetunux ro βlaq luŋan naħa, ʦ~ʨwa maħa kja ɣa knaħu; βniqan na βlaq kajal qalŋ qani. ana ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq ktajux naħa ʦ~ʨquliq qalŋ s~ɕkikun uji ɣa miʦ~ʨa kja s~ɕan naħa. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax qu qalaŋ. s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te ħuɣal ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mwaħ rɣjax. βas~ɕuʔ "βas~ɕuʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ****(qalaŋ s~ɕkikun)
